# ipzilon_hub (Resource)

Manages a hub VNet inside a site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ipzilon_hub" "example" {
  site_id       = 1
  name          = "hub-prod"
  address_space = "10.0.0.0/16"
  location      = "West Europe"
  description   = "Production Hub"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Resource name (must be lowercase — the server normalizes all strings).
- `site_id` (Number) ID of the site this hub belongs to.

### Optional

- `address_space` (String) Hub address space CIDR (e.g. 10.0.0.0/16).
- `description` (String) Free-text description.
- `location` (String) Free-text location label (e.g. West Europe).

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Hub ID.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import ipzilon_hub.example 1
```
